name: Directional selection: dark substrate
summary: Selection against light body color. Analog of the rock pocket mouse example in Campbell Figure 22.13.

vidas_prompts.prompt: At generation 0, what proportion of fish are dark vs light?
Open the organism view on a dark fish. What genotype does it carry at BodyColor?
Over 40 generations, is survival equal across genotypes? Compare allele-0 frequency at start vs end.
The population at generation 40 is adapted in what sense?
What specific selective pressure is acting here? What would happen if the substrate were light instead?
